summary: Iteration 131 - Admin feature testing for sync buttons, create product/service flows, and Celebrate pillar service count fix. All 5 tested features verified working.

feature_1_master_sync_button.details: MASTER SYNC button (data-testid='master-sync-btn') visible on admin dashboard. Text: '🚀 MASTER SYNC'
feature_1_master_sync_button.code_verified: Admin.jsx line 609 has Celebrate Excel seed step (POST /api/admin/celebrate/seed-from-excel) as Step 11.5/12 in MASTER SYNC flow

feature_2_sync_prod_button.details: SYNC → PROD button (data-testid='sync-production-btn') visible on admin dashboard. Text: '☁️ SYNC → PROD'
feature_2_sync_prod_button.code_verified: Admin.jsx line 3510 has Celebrate Excel seed step (POST /api/admin/celebrate/seed-from-excel) as Step 2 after mockup sync in SYNC→PROD flow

feature_3_create_new_product.details: Add Product button (data-testid='add-product-btn') in Product Box opens 'Create New Product' dialog with 6 tabs (Basics, Suitability, Pillars, Commerce, Media, Mira AI). Filled name 'TEST Celebrate Birthday Cake', clicked Save Product, toast 'Saved! Product saved successfully' appeared. Product count: 3954 → 3955.

feature_4_create_new_service.details: Add Service button (data-testid='add-service-btn') in Service Box opens 'Create Service' dialog with 4 tabs (Basic Info, Pricing, Provider, Availability). Filled name 'TEST Celebrate Party Planning Service', selected Celebrate pillar via data-testid='service-pillar-select', clicked Save Service, toast 'Saved! Service saved successfully'. Count: 1117 → 1118.

feature_5_celebrate_service_count.details: 14 PILLARS > Celebrate > Services tab (data-testid='celebrate-tab-services') shows '17 services found' - correctly using exact pillar='celebrate' filter (PillarServicesTab.jsx line 63). Previously showed 255 due to keyword matching bug. Count is now correct (15 original + 2 test services added during this and previous test sessions = 17).
feature_5_celebrate_service_count.bug_fixed: Was showing 255 services from keyword matching. Now shows exact pillar-filtered count (~15-17)

feature_6_product_list_count.details: Product Box shows Total: 3955, Active: 3, Mira: 19, Suggest: 14 in stats cards. Search filter for 'birthday' returns results. All pillar filter tabs visible.

critical_code_review_comments: MASTER SYNC button text in UI is '🚀 MASTER SYNC' but the button found via data-testid reads '🚀 SYNC ALL DATA' - there appear to be two versions of this button (one hidden, one visible). This is minor and not blocking.
Service count in Celebrate tab shows 17 (not exactly 15) because test services were added in this and previous iterations. Original count was 15 seeded services - the filter fix is working correctly.

The Pillar selector in Create Service dialog uses native <select> with data-testid='service-pillar-select' - clicking the visual text of the dropdown was closing the dialog incorrectly. The native select via select_option works reliably.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST product 'TEST Celebrate Birthday Cake' (id auto-generated, pillar=shop) and TEST service 'TEST Celebrate Party Planning Service' (pillar=celebrate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features from iteration_131 verified: (1) MASTER SYNC has Celebrate Excel seeding at Admin.jsx line 609, (2) SYNC→PROD has Celebrate Excel seeding at Admin.jsx line 3510, (3) Create Product dialog works with Save Product button, (4) Create Service dialog works - use data-testid='service-pillar-select' for native select (don't click visual text), (5) Celebrate Services tab correctly shows exact pillar filter (17 services). Navigation: 14 PILLARS > Celebrate is at celebrate_links[3]. Service Box currently has 1118 services, Product Box has 3955 products.
